passiveAbilities.name: Weakling
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -1. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy.

activeAbilities.name: Trickster
activeAbilities.description: When this model successfully bluffs, after resolving the effect you may reveal the bluff and gain +3 energy.

arcaneAbilities.name: Shelter of the Shadowglade
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target gains [Protection: The first time this character would suffer Dmg, reduce that Dmg to W], until end of turn.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Atrophy
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers 2X Magical Dmg.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Mirror of Mischief
signatureMove.endStepEffect: When played, choose a Faerie or Rogue within 6". This becomes a copy of that character's Signature Move. It is still considered a Low Guard when calculating your opponent’s Dmg dealt to you. If there is no Faerie or Rogue characters within 6" then this card deals W Dmg.
